response.summary: Montana Tribe Opposes 'Slap on the Wrist' Fine for Illegal Mining That Polluted Water Source
response.body:
Montana Tribe Opposes ‘Slap on the Wrist’ Fine for Illegal Mining That Polluted Water Source

The Fort Belknap Indian Community is opposing a settlement between the state’s Department of Environmental Quality and mining companies that illegally mined on the tribes’ ancestral homeland, harming crucial water sources for the reservation.

From 2020 to 2022, Blue Arc LLC and Legacy Mining LLC conducted mining activities at the Zortman Mine in the Little Rocky Mountains without permits,…

Montana Tribe Opposes 'Slap on the Wrist’ Fine for Illegal Mining That Polluted Water Source

blog.name: wintery-waxillium
blog.title: The man with the tumblr blog.
blog.description:
*Formerly wax1ll1um*
Warning before you follow: I will post stuff on any fandom and any topic without warning; I will try to tag correctly though.

Profile pic is a pixel art image of a wizard, in a pointy blue hat with brown skin and a white beard, from https://0x72.itch.io/dungeontileset-ii (originally downloaded for a project but I thought it looked good as a PFP).
Header image is from the (very good) fan-game Pokemon Relict; a gif of an androgynous light-brown-haired child holding a glowing orb with golden rings around it.

response.summary: From Product URL to AI Influencer Video Ad in Under 60 Seconds
response.body:
From Product URL to AI Influencer Video Ad in Under 60 Seconds

You have a product page. You require a video ad with a speaker able to effectively persuade in a pitch. One week ago, that time gap would have taken a few days – to brief a creator, ship product, wait on content revision, etc. Currently, it only takes a minute. Of course, it is not the best-case scenario, but the workflow that brands are performing at scale nowadays.
These mechanics behind the…

From Product URL to AI Influencer Video Ad in Under 60 Seconds

response.body:
Recipe: Cheesy Alfredo w/basic spaghetti

Cheesy Alfredo

Original recipe linked here

Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons of butter
  • 2 ounces of cream cheese
  • ½ teaspoons of garlic powder
  • ½ cup of milk
  • 1.5 ounces grated Parmesan cheese
  • black pepper

Instructions

  1. “Melt butter in a medium, nonstick saucepan over medium heat. Add cream cheese and garlic powder, stirring with a wire whisk until smooth. Add milk, a little at a time, whisking to smooth out lumps. Stir in Parmesan cheese and pepper.”
  2. “Remove from heat when sauce reaches desired consistency. Sauce will thicken rapidly. Thin with milk if cooked too long.”
  3. “Toss with hot pasta to serve.”

Spaghetti

Ingredients

  • Pasta
  • Tomato sauce

Instructions

  1. Boil pasta (add oil & salt for flavoring and to help keep the noodles separate
  2. Stir every now and then
  3. Optional: Head up sauce in another pot
  4. Combine
